entries.sentence: The absent student missed the test.
entries.chinese: absent = 缺席的；缺席的学生错过了考试。

entries.sentence: This answer is acceptable.
entries.chinese: acceptable = 可接受的；这个答案可以接受。

entries.sentence: The map is accurate.
entries.chinese: accurate = 准确的；这张地图很准确。

entries.sentence: My grandfather is still active.
entries.chinese: active = 活跃的；我的祖父仍然很活跃。

entries.sentence: She joined an advanced English class.
entries.chinese: advanced = 高级的；她参加了高级英语班。

entries.sentence: The fish was still alive.
entries.chinese: alive = 活着的；那条鱼还活着。

entries.sentence: Don't worry; everything is alright.
entries.chinese: alright = 没问题；别担心，一切都没问题。

entries.sentence: We visited an ancient temple.
entries.chinese: ancient = 古老的；我们参观了一座古老的寺庙。

entries.sentence: The annual school concert is in May.
entries.chinese: annual = 年度的；学校年度音乐会在五月举行。

entries.sentence: She bought an antique clock.
entries.chinese: antique = 古董的；她买了一个古董钟。

entries.sentence: The baby is asleep.
entries.chinese: asleep = 睡着的；宝宝睡着了。

entries.sentence: The poster has an attractive design.
entries.chinese: attractive = 有吸引力的；这张海报设计得很有吸引力。

entries.sentence: Tickets are available online.
entries.chinese: available = 可获得的；门票可以在网上买到。

entries.sentence: I was awake at midnight.
entries.chinese: awake = 醒着的；午夜时我还醒着。

entries.sentence: The view from the hill was awesome.
entries.chinese: awesome = 极好的；山上的景色极好。

entries.sentence: The weather was bad yesterday.
entries.chinese: bad = 糟糕的；昨天天气很糟糕。

entries.sentence: The bald man wore a hat.
entries.chinese: bald = 秃头的；那个秃头男人戴着帽子。

entries.sentence: This course teaches basic grammar.
entries.chinese: basic = 基本的；这门课程教授基本语法。

entries.sentence: The garden is beautiful in spring.
entries.chinese: beautiful = 美丽的；春天的花园很美。

entries.sentence: This is the best answer.
entries.chinese: best = 最好的；这是最好的答案。

entries.sentence: She feels better today.
entries.chinese: better = 更好的；她今天感觉好多了。

entries.sentence: They live in a big house.
entries.chinese: big = 大的；他们住在一所大房子里。

entries.sentence: The coffee tastes bitter.
entries.chinese: bitter = 苦的；这杯咖啡尝起来很苦。

entries.sentence: She wore a black coat.
entries.chinese: black = 黑色的；她穿了一件黑色外套。

entries.sentence: The blind singer performed beautifully.
entries.chinese: blind = 失明的；那位失明的歌手表演得很美。

entries.sentence: The blond child waved at us.
entries.chinese: blond = 金发的；那个金发孩子向我们挥手。

entries.sentence: He chose a blue shirt.
entries.chinese: blue = 蓝色的；他选了一件蓝色衬衫。

entries.sentence: We ate boiled potatoes.
entries.chinese: boiled = 煮熟的；我们吃了煮熟的土豆。

entries.sentence: The bold title was easy to read.
entries.chinese: bold = 粗体的；粗体标题很容易阅读。

entries.sentence: She was born in April.
entries.chinese: born = 出生的；她出生在四月。

entries.sentence: His bossy sister told everyone what to do.
entries.chinese: bossy = 专横的；他专横的姐姐指挥每个人做事。

entries.sentence: Sign on the bottom line.
entries.chinese: bottom = 底部的；在底部那一行签名。

entries.sentence: She bought a brand new bike.
entries.chinese: brand new = 崭新的；她买了一辆崭新的自行车。

entries.sentence: The teacher gave a brief explanation.
entries.chinese: brief = 简短的；老师做了简短的解释。

entries.sentence: His idea was brilliant.
entries.chinese: brilliant = 出色的；他的想法很出色。

entries.sentence: A broad path led to the lake.
entries.chinese: broad = 宽阔的；一条宽阔的小路通向湖边。

entries.sentence: The broken chair was in the corner.
entries.chinese: broken = 坏了的；坏椅子在角落里。

entries.sentence: The dog has brown ears.
entries.chinese: brown = 棕色的；这只狗有棕色耳朵。

entries.sentence: The burning candle lit the room.
entries.chinese: burning = 燃烧的；燃烧的蜡烛照亮了房间。

entries.sentence: The cafe was busy at lunchtime.
entries.chinese: busy = 忙碌的；午餐时间咖啡馆很忙。

entries.sentence: London is the capital city of the UK.
entries.chinese: capital = 首都的；伦敦是英国的首都城市。

entries.sentence: The cardboard box was light.
entries.chinese: cardboard = 纸板的；这个纸板箱很轻。

entries.sentence: Be careful on the icy road.
entries.chinese: careful = 小心的；在结冰的路上要小心。

entries.sentence: A careless mistake cost him a mark.
entries.chinese: careless = 粗心的；一个粗心的错误让他丢了一分。

entries.sentence: Wear casual clothes to the picnic.
entries.chinese: casual = 休闲的；野餐时穿休闲衣服。

entries.sentence: Our hotel is in a central area.
entries.chinese: central = 中心的；我们的酒店在中心区域。

entries.sentence: I am certain that the shop is open.
entries.chinese: certain = 确信的；我确信商店开着。

entries.sentence: The mountain walk was challenging.
entries.chinese: challenging = 有挑战性的；这次山路徒步很有挑战性。

entries.sentence: The village has a charming square.
entries.chinese: charming = 迷人的；这个村庄有一个迷人的广场。

entries.sentence: The clever child solved the puzzle.
entries.chinese: clever = 聪明的；聪明的孩子解开了谜题。
